IIB Project: Analysis of Low Cost Particle Image Velocimetry

"Analysis of Low Cost Particle Velocimetry.pdf" - A Masters thesis detailing work on Particle Image Velocimetry.
"DigitalTwin.py" - A module capable of synthetic PIV image generation, velocity estimation and system error analysis. Tool architecture is explained in the thesis.
"DataGeneration.py" - The code used to generate most of the data for the thesis. An example of how to use "DigitalTwin.py".
"Data viewer.py" - A suite of tools to visualise data, designed for use with the data generated by "DataGeneration.py".

Author: Harry Chacksfield
Date: June 2026
